title: Digital equity beats campaign dependency
excerpt: Why ownership compounds where rented attention fades.

seo.title: Digital equity beats campaign dependency
seo.description: Why ownership compounds where rented attention fades.

children.text: Most teams optimise for campaign cycles. Digiteq optimises for owned assets that compound: brands, products, media and audiences that retain value after spend stops.

title: How holding companies should use CMS architecture
excerpt: Structured content as an operating layer, not a marketing afterthought.

seo.title: How holding companies should use CMS architecture
seo.description: Structured content as an operating layer, not a marketing afterthought.

children.text: A holding company site is not a brochure. It is the schema for portfolio companies, ventures, insights and acquisition criteria. Build the CMS first and the platform follows.

title: What makes a digital asset acquirable
excerpt: The signals we look for before a conversation starts.

seo.title: What makes a digital asset acquirable
seo.description: The signals we look for before a conversation starts.

children.text: Profitable niches, durable search intent, clean data and operational upside. We move quickly when the fundamentals are clear and the founder wants a fair process.
